title: What Devon Built
youtube_title: Aris Chronicles Ep. 7 — What Devon Built
caption:
Devon built it quietly. Over a weekend. And it was already running.

Ep. 7 — The Aris Chronicles: Kai sees the demo. But seeing a demo and seeing what Devon actually shipped are two different things.

#TheArisChronicles #SerialFiction #AIStory #Entrepreneurship #Founders
